tests.notes: Navbar (<nav>), Hero (<section class='hero'>), Features (<section class='features'>), Stats (<section class='stats'>), Testimonials (<section class='testimonials'>), Pricing (<section class='pricing'>), Newsletter (<section class='newsletter'>), and Footer (<footer class='footer'>) are all present in index.html.
All major sections use semantic class names matching their purpose: hero, features, stats, testimonials, pricing, newsletter, footer.

HTML has data-theme attribute. CSS uses html[data-theme='dark'] and html[data-theme='light'] selectors with custom properties. JS reads/writes localStorage['theme'], defaults to 'dark', and updates the attribute via applyTheme().

CSS sets opacity:0 and transform:translateY(40px) on sections, and opacity:1/transform:translateY(0) on .visible. JS uses IntersectionObserver at 0.15 threshold to add .visible class. Hero is made visible immediately on load.
Navbar has position:sticky and top:0 in CSS. JS intercepts all a[href^='#'] links and calls scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}).

tests.testName: Features cards (3 cards, emoji, hover lift)
tests.notes: Three feature cards exist with emoji icons (📊, 🛡️, ⚡). CSS hover effect uses transform:translateY(-4px) and increased box-shadow with 0.2s transition.

tests.testName: Stats counters (4 counters, data-target, animation, pop)
tests.notes: Four counters with data-target values (12500, 8200, 99.9, 24). JS uses IntersectionObserver + requestAnimationFrame with easeOutQuad over 2s. Adds .pop class at completion triggering scale-pop keyframe animation.

Three testimonial cards with absolute positioning and opacity fade. Prev/Next buttons and 3 dot indicators are present and wired in JS. Auto-advance uses setInterval every 5000ms. mouseenter/mouseleave pause and resume auto-advance.

tests.testName: Pricing tiers (3 tiers, Pro badge, equal height, hover)
tests.notes: Three pricing cards: Starter $9, Pro $29, Enterprise $99. Pro has .popular class with accent border and 'Most Popular' badge. Cards use flex column with flex-grow:1 for equal height. Hover applies scale(1.02) and larger shadow.

Regex validation (/.+@.+\..+/) on submit. Invalid state adds .invalid class triggering red border (#ef4444) and shake animation. Valid submission clears input, shows green toast with 'Subscribed!' text, and removes show class after 3000ms causing fade-out transition.

Mobile-first CSS with media queries at min-width:768px and min-width:1024px. Features grid goes 1→2→3 columns. Stats grid goes 1→2→4 columns. Pricing grid goes 1→2→3 columns. Footer grid adapts accordingly.

Hamburger button visible on mobile, hidden on desktop (768px+). Mobile nav panel uses fixed positioning with transform:translateX(100%) and slides in with .open class. Closes on outside click and nav link selection. ARIA attributes updated in JS.
index.html contains no external CDN links, no framework imports, and no third-party script tags. Only links to local styles.css and app.js.
All three files are pure vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with no frameworks, preprocessors, or build tools evident.

tests.testName: index.html links to styles.css and app.js correctly
tests.notes: Correct relative paths: <link rel='stylesheet' href='styles.css'> and <script defer src='app.js'></script>.
JS applyTheme() sets moon emoji (🌙) for dark theme and sun emoji (☀️) for light theme. Initial HTML state matches dark theme default.

tests.testName: Hero animated gradient and pulse CTA
tests.notes: Hero background uses linear-gradient with background-size:400% 400% and animation:shiftHue 12s ease infinite. CTA button has animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite scaling between 1 and 1.03.
Counter elements start at 0 in HTML. JS requestAnimationFrame loop interpolates from 0 to data-target value using easeOutQuad easing over 2 seconds.
Footer contains copyright text '© 2024 Dashflow. All rights reserved.' and three columns of placeholder links (Product, Company, Legal) plus social media emoji placeholders.

tests.testName: CSS transitions for theme color changes
tests.notes: Body has transition:background-color 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease. Multiple components include background-color 0.3s and color 0.3s in their transitions, ensuring smooth theme switching.
